result:
I'd make every human mind start with an unshakeable, built-in drive to understand reality as it actually is, rather than as it feels or as it serves their tribe. 

Everything else—conflict, bad decisions, wasted lives—mostly flows from people being wired to protect comforting stories instead of chasing what's true. Fix that at the root and the rest starts solving itself.

message.content:
I'd make every human mind start with an unshakeable, built-in drive to understand reality as it actually is, rather than as it feels or as it serves their tribe. 

Everything else—conflict, bad decisions, wasted lives—mostly flows from people being wired to protect comforting stories instead of chasing what's true. Fix that at the root and the rest starts solving itself.
message.reasoning_content: If I could change the world in one way, I'd make curiosity and the pursuit of truth the dominant human impulse, overriding tribalism, greed, and fear. That single shift could solve most of our self-inflicted problems.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
